title: Plan your future
content:
## Plan your future , Whakamahere ā mua
Plan ahead to make your career goals happen.

## Get advice Whiwhi tohutohu ,
How to make a career action plan and who to talk to.
- Featured guide Take action on your career decision Whakatutukihia tō whakatau aramahi You’ve thought hard, done your research and made a career decision. Now it’s time to set some goals and work out the steps to achieve them.

## Take action on your career decision

## Whakatutukihia tō whakatau aramahi
You’ve thought hard, done your research and made a career decision. Now it’s time to set some goals and work out the steps to achieve them.
- Guide How to talk to study and training providers Me pēhea te kōrero ki ngā kaiwhakarato akoranga, whakangungu hoki Doing some planning can help you get the information you need from study and training providers.

## How to talk to study and training providers

## Me pēhea te kōrero ki ngā kaiwhakarato akoranga, whakangungu hoki
Doing some planning can help you get the information you need from study and training providers.
- Guide How to talk to employers Me pēhea te kōrero ki ngā kaituku mahi Talking to employers can be scary but is a good way to find out about different career opportunities and how you could get started in them.

## How to talk to employers

## Me pēhea te kōrero ki ngā kaituku mahi
Talking to employers can be scary but is a good way to find out about different career opportunities and how you could get started in them.
How to get help to make a career decision.
- Featured guide How to make a career decision Me pēhea te hanga whakataunga aramahi Choosing a career path is a big deal. Here’s how to check if you’ve made the best decision.

## How to make a career decision

## Me pēhea te hanga whakataunga aramahi
Choosing a career path is a big deal. Here’s how to check if you’ve made the best decision.
- Guide Get help to make a career decision Tiki āwhina ki te whakatau i tō aramahi Talking to people you trust can help you feel confident about your education and career choices.

## Get help to make a career decision

## Tiki āwhina ki te whakatau i tō aramahi
Talking to people you trust can help you feel confident about your education and career choices.
- Guide How to choose study or training Me pēhea te kōwhiri i ngā mahi ako, ngā mahi whakangungu rānei You’ve found a career direction you like. Here’s how to choose the right study or training to get you on your way.

## How to choose study or training

## Me pēhea te kōwhiri i ngā mahi ako, ngā mahi whakangungu rānei
You’ve found a career direction you like. Here’s how to choose the right study or training to get you on your way.
